All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AudioManager
Utility class that manages background music playback for Escritura Rapida.
Game
Represents the core game logic for Escritura Rapida.
GameController
Controller for the main game screen of Escritura Rapida.
GameKeyAdapter
Interface that defines the contract for keyboard event handling in Escritura Rapida.
GameKeyHandler
Adapter class that bridges JavaFX keyboard events with the GameKeyAdapter interface.
GameOverController
Controller for the game over screen of Escritura Rapida.
GameStage
Represents the game window of Escritura Rapida.
IGame
Interface that defines the contract for the game logic of Escritura Rapida.
IWords
Interface that defines the contract for word management in Escritura Rapida.
Main
Entry point of the Escritura Rapida application.
MenuController
Controller for the main menu screen of Escritura Rapida.
MenuStage
Represents the main menu window of Escritura Rapida.
Words
Manages the word lists for Escritura Rapida, organized by difficulty level.
